CustomField.formula: Estimated_Sales_Income_April_USD__c + Estimated_Sales_Income_Augest_USD__c + Estimated_Sales_Income_December_USD__c + Estimated_Sales_Income_February_USD__c + Estimated_Sales_Income_January_USD__c + Estimated_Sales_Income_July_USD__c + Estimated_Sales_Income_March_USD__c + Estimated_Sales_Income_May_USD__c + Estimated_Sales_Income_November_USD__c + Estimated_Sales_Income_October_USD__c + Estimated_Sales_Income_June_USD__c + Estimated_Sales_Income_September_USD__c
CustomField.label: Total Estimated Sales Income(USD)
